title: tithonia humilis
intro: Tithonia humilis, also known as Mexican sunflower, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, and has been used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tithonia humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Tithonia humilis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
